core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine high-end fashion editorial aesthetics with technical AI tooling.
Emotion First: The studio must feel limitless and premium. Use deep shadows and striking focal points.
Content is King: The generated AI art is the hero. UI must recede, acting as an elegant frame.
Zoom In: Use large, immersive image previews.
Contrast: Absolute black backgrounds with razor-sharp electric accents.
anti_patterns: No Inter, Space Grotesk, or standard generic SaaS fonts.
No standard Bootstrap columns. Use asymmetric Bento Grids.
No muddy gray backgrounds. Use absolute deep blacks or tinted obsidians.
No generic 'Vercel-look' Shadcn components. Override with aggressive borders and typography.

spacing_and_layout.containers: Padding p-8 or p-12 minimum for cards with borders. No text collision.

grids.marketing: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric spanning. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
grids.studio: Mode B: The Control Room Grid. Dense. grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4. 100% height utilization.

components_strategy.general: Always use pure HTML + Tailwind for macro layouts. Use heavily customized Shadcn UI for interactive logic.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E1FF01] text-black font-medium tracking-tight rounded-none px-8 py-4 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(225,255,1,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white/5
buttons.magic_generate: bg-black border-2 border-[#E1FF01] text-[#E1FF01] rounded-none hover:bg-[#E1FF01] hover:text-black transition-all duration-300

components_strategy.cards: Flat background (#121212), 1px solid border (#27272A), sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-md), zero shadow. On hover: slight border brightness increase.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn components heavily modified. Background black, 1px border. Focus state must have 2px #E1FF01 ring.
components_strategy.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050505]/70 border-b border-white/10. Sticky top.
components_strategy.dialogs_and_modals: Dark overlay (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm), solid #121212 surface for the modal, sharp borders.
components_strategy.toast: Sonner toast. Dark mode, sharp borders, minimal.

motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements must change state. Buttons lift (-translate-y-1), borders brighten.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform duration-300 ease-out.
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Implement smooth scrolling via Lenis. Marquees for community generations using react-fast-marquee.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus rings.

landing_page.hero: Immersive dark hero. Abstract glowing orb background (opacity 30%). Massive H1. Primary CTA.
landing_page.model_showcase: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode). Showcasing Midjourney v8, Sora 2, FLUX, etc. Large visual thumbnails.
landing_page.pricing: Tracing Beam effect on the 'Pro' card. Stripe checkout integration markers.
landing_page.marquee: Kinetic Texture marquee with 'GENERATE BEYOND LIMITS' outlined text.

models_catalog.filters: Shadcn Tabs (Image vs Video) and Select (Categories: Realistic, Anime, Cinematic, NSFW-Spicy).
models_catalog.cards: Model name, tag (Image/Video), brief description. Hover plays video snippet or expands image.

generation_studio.layout: Control Room Grid. No scrolling on desktop (h-screen minus header).
generation_studio.left_panel: col-span-1. Prompt textarea, Model Select (Dropdown), Aspect Ratio (Shadcn Slider/Toggle Group), Image Reference Upload.
generation_studio.center_canvas: col-span-2. The 'Output'. Large, glassmorphic container displaying the generated asset or loading state.
generation_studio.right_panel: col-span-1. Generation History. Tall narrow list (Feed/List mode).

user_dashboard.layout: Standard dashboard. Sidebar nav. Metric cards (Credits remaining).
user_dashboard.sections: Subscription status (Stripe portal link), Personal Gallery.

testing_requirements.data_testid: MANDATORY. All buttons, links, form inputs, model selectors, and Stripe buttons must have a kebab-case data-testid (e.g., data-testid='generate-art-button').

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing orb, perfect for a subtle, high-end dark background overlay.

model_examples_cinematic.usage: Example generation for FLUX or Midjourney v8 model card.

model_examples_surreal.usage: Example generation for Grok Imagine or Wan 2.7.

model_examples_anime.usage: Example generation for Seedance or Midjourney v7 Anime style.

model_examples_product.description: Hyper realistic product photography of a drill.
